Counting Errors per Run: Raw Responses

← Mean-per-page version (Naive vs Guided)Download CSV (all rows)

For each counting question, every individual model run is plotted as a dot. Y-axis = signed error (model response − GT); zero line = ground truth. Each page on the x-axis has up to 50 dots in each panel (5 models × 10 runs). Hover any dot for page ID, model, run number, GT, response, and error. Compare the spread within each page to see model variability. Use the legend to toggle individual models on/off.
